hero_sub: India's smartest way to track expenses and save.
faq_main_sub: Everything you need to know about BachatKaro.
faq_a1: Yes! The core expense tracking and family budgeting features are 100% free with no hidden charges.
faq_q2: When will BachatKaro be available on the Google Play Store?
faq_a2:
BachatKaro is built to help India save smarter.
Our goal is simple — make money management easy, intelligent, and accessible for everyone.

We are continuously improving the app across platforms.
The Android version will soon be available on the Play Store for a seamless experience.

Bachat karega India, tabhi toh sapne pure karega India 🇮🇳
faq_q3: How is my financial data secured?
faq_a3: We use bank-grade encryption. Your SMS data is processed locally on your device by our advanced SMS Engine and is never read by our servers.
faq_q4: Why don't you give Reward Points or Cashbacks?
faq_a4: Because we focus on real savings, not marketing gimmicks. Cashbacks psychologically trick you into spending more. Our goal is to help you save a solid ₹5,000+ every month.
faq_q5: How is BachatKaro different from other apps?
faq_a5: No unnecessary clutter, no annoying ads forcing you to take personal loans. Just a clean, automated dashboard for your family's budget, trip splitting, and smart EMI tracking.
footer_made_with_ORV: Made with love for India By ORV Technology ❤️
about_mission_desc: Our goal is to give every Indian a correct account of their hard-earned money and save them from wasteful spending. Bachat karega India, tabhi toh sapne pure karega India!
contact_sub: We are always here to help you. You are our family, so feel free to talk.
choose_group_msg: Choose a group from the top menu or create a new one to start recording shared bills.
premium_trial_ended: Your 30-day free trial has ended. Upgrade to Pro to Edit and Delete bills just by speaking!
clear_ledger_confirm_desc: This will delete ALL entries from this group. This cannot be undone.
add_min_members: Add at least 2 members to the group first!
only_admins_settle: Only group admins can manually mark debts as settled.
